concerns.sentence: Acute respiratory failure [E:cond:1], acute vascular insufficiency of intestine [E:cond:2], and COPD with acute exacerbation [E:cond:3][E:note:row673718:11].
concerns.reason: The fact sheet specifies 'Chronic obstructive asthma', not 'COPD'.

recommended_revisions.original: Acute respiratory failure [E:cond:1], acute vascular insufficiency of intestine [E:cond:2], and COPD with acute exacerbation [E:cond:3][E:note:row673718:11].
recommended_revisions.suggested: Acute respiratory failure [E:cond:1], acute vascular insufficiency of intestine [E:cond:2], and chronic obstructive asthma with acute exacerbation [E:cond:3][E:note:row673718:11].
